Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

SpTU 2, 034 [Šumma Alu Excerpts][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

* NA ina tal-lak-ti E₂ A-MEŠ TU₅ ul ul-tab-bar

 

(o 1) (If) a man bathes in water in the access way of a house: he will not live long.

o 22

* NA <ina> li-la-a-ti

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

ul i-šar₂-ri

(o 2) (If) a man ditto (bathes in water) in the evening: he will not become rich.

o 33

* ina MUL

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

ḫat-tu₄ NI₂-šu₂ ŠUB-su

(o 3) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) under the star(s): terror will fall on him.

o 44

* ina EN.NU.UN.AN.USAN

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

ŠU-MIN-šu₂ u GIR₃-MIN-šu₂ i-qal-li-lu

(o 4) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) during the evening watch: his hands and his feet will become light".1

o 55

* ina EN.NU.UN.MURU₂.BA

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

it-ta-lak

(o 5) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) during the middle watch: he will go away.

o 66

* ina EN.NU.UN.U₄.ZAL.LI

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

ni-bit-ti

(o 6) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) during the dawn watch: chosen one (of the gods).

o 77

* ina A₂.GU₂.ZI.GA

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

i-pa-šaḫ

(o 7) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) during the morning: he will calm down.

o 88

* ina na-ma-ri

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

MIN<(i-pa-šaḫ)> i-sa-dir

(o 8) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) at dawn: he will always calm down.

o 99

* ina U₄.SA₉-AM₃

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

ar₂-na dan-na i-za-bil

(o 9) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) at midday: he will bear a severe punishment.

o 1010

* ina IGI ḫi-pi₂DAN

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

ZI.GA-BI GUB

(o 10) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) in front of (gloss: break) ...: his loss will become permanent.

o 1111

* ina IGI ḫi-pi₂A₂-šu₂

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

NAM.TAG.GA DU₈er

(o 11) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) in front of (gloss: break) his arm: the sin will be removed.

o 1212

* ina ESIR! ḫi-pi₂

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

KAL EL

(o 12) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) in bitumen (gloss: break) ...: he ....

o 1313

* ina A ḫi-pi₂MUŠ₃

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

A₂.TUKU TUKUši

(o 13) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) in ... (gloss: break): he will make a profit.

o 1414

* ina KI ḫi-pi₂

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

ḪUL ina SU-šu₂ DU₈er

(o 14) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) in ... (gloss: break): evil will be removed from his body.

o 1515

* ina E₂ ḫi-pi₂ḪI

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

DINGIR-šu₂ KI-šu₂ ze-ni

(o 15) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) in a house (gloss: break)...: his (personal) god will be angry with him.

o 1616

* ina E₂ ḫi-pi₂NA₂

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

SAG.GEME₂.IR₃-MES AŠ.AŠ

(o 16) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) in a house (gloss: break)...: the domestic staff will always be obedient.

o 1717

* ina ⸢E₂⸣ ḫi-pi₂DI I

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

i-gal-lut

(o 17) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) in a house (gloss: break)...: he will tremble (from fear).

o 1818

* ina ⸢E₂⸣ ḫi-pi₂

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

<<ina>> ŠUBtu₂ GAR-su

(o 18) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) in a house (gloss: break): illness will afflict him.

o 1919

* ina a-bu-us-su

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

ZI ŠA₃-šu₂ in-ne₂-ṭi-ir

(o 19) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) in his storehouse: his desire will be taken away.

o 2020

* ina E₂ NUN

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

U₄ gam-ru-tu₄

(o 20) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) in a prince's house: completed days.

o 2121

* ina GABA DIŠ

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

ṭe-ep ša₂-ap-ti TUKU

(o 21) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) opposite ...: he will be affected by a swelling of the lip.

o 2222

* ina GABA DIŠ

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

NA BI UKU₂.DU

(o 22) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) opposite ...: he will become poor.

o 2323

* ina UR₃ <<ma-gal>>

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

<ma-gal> id-dal-laḫ

(o 23) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) on the roof: he will be greatly disturbed.

o 2424

* ina UGU gišI.DIB

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

i-tar-ru-ur

(o 24) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) over a wooden threshold: he will tremble.

o 2525

* ina E₂ I.DIB

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅-ma!(ŠU)

ru-mi-ka-ti ana EDIN E₃ ina ŠA₃ MU BI UŠ₂

(o 25) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) over the threshold of a house2 and releases the waste bath-water to the open country: he will die in the middle of that year.

o 2626

* ina UGU KI.MAḪ

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

UŠ₂ ana ḪULti₃ UŠ-MEŠ-šu₂

(o 26) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) over a grave: he will die; they will persecute him with evil.

o 2727

* ina UGU GI

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

mi-ḫi-ir NA BI UGU-šu₂ GUBaz

(o 27) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) over reeds: adversity will remain over that man.

o 2828

* ina GU₂ NI₃! ŠU GID₂.DA

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

da-bi-bu-šu₂ i-min₃-du

(o 28) (If) he ditto (bathes in Water) on the bank of a long ...: his slanderers will become numerous.

o 2929

* ina MIN IRI ḪU UṢ

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

im!-ta-na-ag-ga-<ag>

(o 29) (If) in ditto ... a city ... he ditto (bathes in water): he will keep having cramps ....

o 3030

* ina ID₂

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

MU SIG₅ti₃ iš-ša₂-kan₂

(o 30) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) by the river: a name of good fortune will be given (to him).

o 3131

* ina A ḫi-ri-ti

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

ina E₂ BI UŠ₂.UŠ₂

(o 31) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) by a water-ditch: in that household, (people) will die one after another.

o 3232

* ina is-se-e

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

ina-ḫi-iš

(o 32) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) in a clay pit: he will prosper.

o 3333

* ina GU₂ SUR₃e

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

ina-mi-ir

(o 33) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) on the bank of a water channel: he will beam.

o 3434

* ina PA₅

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

mi-šit-ti i-ma-aš-ši-is-su

(o 34) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) by a ditch: palsy will strike him.

o 3535

* ina ID₂

MIN<(A-MEŠ)> TU₅

TEŠ₂ TUKU

(o 35) (If) he ditto (bathes in water) by the river: he will acquire dignity.

o 3636

* ina ID₂ [...] ⸢ŠU₂⸣ SIG₅-šu₂

(o 36) (If) he [...] by the river: [...] ... will do him a favour.

o 3737

* ina ⸢A⸣ x x [...] TUKUši

(o 37) (If) he [...] in ... [...]: he will experience [...].

o 3838

* ina [...]

(o 38) (If) in [...].

(rest of obverse missing)
Reverse
rr NaN  (start of reverse missing)
r 1'r 1'

* GIŠ.⸢KUN!-šu₂ MIN⸣ x [...]

(r 1') (If) his loins ditto ... [...]

r 2'2'

* GIŠ₃-šu₂ MIN AN NA ⸢TUKUši⸣ x [...]

(r 2') (If) his penis ditto: he will experience ... [...].

r 3'3'

* GU.DU-šu₂ MIN mi-qit KA TUKUši : * SIG₂ NIN!-šu₂ ⸢MIN⸣ [...] x TUKUši

(r 3') (If) his buttocks ditto: he will become impudent. : (If) his sister's hair ditto [...]: ... he will experience.

r 4'4'

* UR₂-šu₂ MIN SAG.DU-su i-ra-ʾu-ub : * kin-ṣi-šu₂ MIN i-dam!-mi-iq-qa-šu₂

(r 4') (If) his lap ditto: his head will shake. : (If) his shins ditto: they will do him a favour.

r 5'5'

* ša-pu-li-šu₂ MIN ina-ḫi-iš : * ki-ṣil-li-šu₂ MIN UZU-BI NU DU₁₀.GA

(r 5') (If) his inner thighs ditto: he will prosper. : (If) his ankles ditto: he will not improve his health.

r 6'6'

* a-ḫi-šu₂ MIN ŠA₃-BI NU DU₁₀.GA : * am-ma-ti-šu₂ MIN ⸢i-gal⸣-lu-ut

(r 6') (If) his arms ditto: he will not be satisfied. : (If) his forearms ditto: he will tremble.

r 7'7'

* ŠU.SI KIŠIB-MEŠ-šu₂ MIN U₄ 1-KAM i-ber-ri : * SIG₄ GIR₃-šu₂ MIN ŠA₃-šu₂ iḫ-ḫi-ip-<pi>

(r 7') (If) the fingers of his hand ditto: he will be hungry for 1 day. : (If) the soles of his feet ditto: his heart will be broken.

r 8'8'

* ŠU.SI-MEŠ GIR₃-šu₂ MIN i-ma-ṭi : * me-se-e ŠU-MIN-šu₂ GIM IM.BABBAR MU ra-ba-a TUKUši

(r 8') (If) his toes ditto: he will be emaciated. : (If the water) for washing his hands (is) like gypsum: he will attain a great name.

r 9'9'

* ki-ma KAŠ ŠA₃-BI DU₁₀.GA : * ki-ma ESIR ŠA₃-BI NU DU₁₀.GA

(r 9') (If it is) like beer: he will be satisfied. : (If it is) like bitumen: he will not be satisfied.

r 10'10'

* MIN<(ki-ma)> imGU₂.EN.NA NA BI i-ber-ri : * MIN<(ki-ma)> IR I₃.GIŠ.A UZU-BI NU DU₁₀.GA

(r 10') (If it is) ditto (like) river sediment: that man will be hungry. : (If it is) ditto (like) oil's exudation : he will not improve his health.

r 11'11'

* MIN<(ki-ma)> IR I₃.SAG ina-wi-ir : * MIN<(ki-ma)> IR <I₃> gišEREN I.BI₂.ZA DU₈-šu!(MA)

(r 11') (If it is) ditto (like) a fine oil's exudation: he will beam. : (If it is) ditto (like) cedar oil's exudation: a financial loss will be cancelled for him.

r 12'12'

* MIN<(ki-ma)> IR LAL₃ BABBAR NA BI i-ma-ar!(AD-)<(ra-aṣ-ma)> ḫi-pi₂BA.UŠ₂ : * MIN<(ki-ma)> IR I₃.NUN i-qal-lil

(r 12') (If it is) ditto (like) white honey's exudation: that man will become sick and (gloss: break) he will die. : (If it is) ditto (like) butter's exudation: he will become weak.

r 13'13'

* MIN<(ki-ma)> IR KAŠ MU-šu₂ NU SIG₅ : * MIN<(ki-ma)> IR KAŠ.ULUŠIN NA MU MUNUS.SIG₅ MUar₂

(r 13') (If it is) ditto (like) beer's exudation: his reputation will not improve. : (If it is) ditto (like) date-sweetened emmer beer's exudation: (that) man will be given a good reputation.

r 14'14'

* MIN<(ki-ma)> IR KAŠ maš-ti-ti iq-al-lu : * bir-ṣa na-du-u₂-šu!(MA) LUGAL KURsu

(r 14') (If it is) ditto (like) measured beer's exudation: he will be burnt. : If lightning has fallen on him: the king will reach him.

r 15'15'

* GIM IM dal-ḫu NU-ME-šu ša IM šu-nu-lu : * um-ta-aṣ-ṣa-ru NU-ME-šu ša I₃.UDU šu-nu-lu

(r 15') (If it is) like disturbed clay: his clay figurines will be laid down. : (If) they stride about: his tallow figurines will be laid down.

r 16'16'

* BABBAR GE₆ SA₅ SIG₇ pe-lu-u₂ NU-ME-šu!(ŠA) ḫi-pi₂UŠ₂ : * uk-tap-pa-lu NU-ME-šu ana A ŠUB-MEŠ

(r 16') (If) they are white, black, red, green (or) light red: his figurines (gloss: break) ... he will die. : (If) they roll up: his figurines will be thrown into the water.

r 17'17'

* ŠUB A₂ TUKU DINGIR ZAL : * ŠUB A₂ la₃ TUKU UKU₂in

(r 17') (If) he becomes negligent: the god will beam (on him). : (If) he does not become negligent: he will become poor.

r 18'18'

* UGU iš-ta-aḫ-ḫu i-dam!-mi-qa-šu₂ : * IGI-MEŠ-šu₂ im-si TI.LA TEŠ₂ IGI

(r 18') (If) he ... : they will do him a favour. : (If) he washes his eyes, he will experience a life of dignity.

r 19'19'

* IGI-MEŠ-šu₂ la₃ im-si mim-ma ana IGI-šu₂ GARnu SA₂.SA₂ : * ŠU-MEŠ-šu₂ im-si ina-wi-ir

(r 19') (If) he does not wash his eyes: he will obtain whatever is placed in front of him. : (If) he washes his hands, he will beam.

r 20'20'

* IGI-MEŠ-šu₂ la₃ im-si dul-la i-ma-al-la : * GIR₃-MEŠ-šu₂ im-si INIM-šu₂ i-dam-ma-qu-šu₂

(r 20') (If) he does not wash his eyes: he will be full of misery. : (If) he washes his feet: his affairs will prosper for him.

r 21'21'

* GIR₃-MEŠ-šu₂ la₃ im-si EN DU₁₁-šu₂ iš-te-ni-ʾi-i : * ru-um-mu-ka-tu₄ ik-bu-us₂ GIR₃-MEŠ-šu₂

(r 21') (If) he does not wash his feet: his enemy will keep changing. : (If) he steps in waste bath-water: his feet will be flattened.

r 22'22'

* A TU₅ ḫi-pi₂NIG₂.ŠU.LUḪ.ḪA uš-ta-na-aḫ ŠA₃-BI NU DU₁₀.GA : : i-šam-ma-ṭa1

(r 22') (If) the bathing water (gloss: break) suffuses in the water-basin: he will not be satisfied.

r 23'23'

* A TU₅ ḫi-pi₂ŠU NIG₂.ŠU.LUḪ.ḪA ŠA₃-BI DU₁₀.GA

(r 23') (If) the bathing water (gloss: break) ... the wash-basin: he will be satisfied.

r 24'24'

* A NIG₂.<ŠU.LUḪ>.ḪA ḫi-pi₂BU iš-ta-ti am-ti NU TUKUši

(r 24') (If) he drinks the water of the wash-basin... (gloss: break)...: he will not acquire a female slave.

r 25'25'

* A NIG₂.ŠU.<(LUḪ.ḪA)> ḫi-pi₂ḪA u₂-ter id-dal-laḫ

(r 25') (If) he regurgitates the water of the wash-basin... (gloss: break)...: he will be disturbed.

r 26'26'

* I₃ GI DU₁₀.GA ŠEŠ₂ GABA.RI NU TUKUši

(r 26') (If) he annoints (himself with) sweet reed oil: he will not acquire an opponent.

r 27'27'

43 ni-is-ḫi * IRI ina SUKUDe GARin BAR-MEŠ la₃ AL.TIL

(r 27') 43rd excerpt of "If a city is located on a height"; non-canonical; not completed.

(catchline)
r 28'28'

* NA ŠU-MIN-šu₂ i-na NAGA.SI LU₂ BI ŠA₃-BI DU₁₀.GA

(r 28') (If) a man (washes) his hands in glasswort: that man will be satisfied.

(colophon)
r 29'29'

* TA gišDA GABA.RI NIBRUki SAR-ma up-puš₄

(r 29') Written and properly executed from a writing board, copy of Nippur.

r 30'30'

* IM mBAša₂-a bu-kur₂ mdINANA—MU—KAM ŠA₃.BAL.BAL mE₂.KUR—za-kir lu₂MAŠ.MAŠ

(r 30') Tablet of Iqiša, son of Ištar-šum-ereš, descendant of Ekur-zakir, incantation priest.

1The verbal form "i-šam-ma-ṭa" belongs to the preceding line.

1 The expression "qātāšu u šepāšu iqallilū " means "to become poor " according to a commentary to Šumma Ālu (KAR 52 : 5f ), quoted by CAD Q : 55.

2 The text says "the house of the threshold".
